about.title:
About
tria
about.description1: Founded in Costa Rica, tria is a software enterprise built by engineers who believe great technology starts with understanding real problems. We design, build, and scale digital products that simplify complexity and drive measurable outcomes.
about.description2: Our team spans cloud architecture, full-stack development, AI/ML, and cybersecurity — working together to deliver enterprise-grade solutions. Every project begins with a question: how can we make this simpler, faster, and more reliable?
about.quote: Crafted in Costa Rica, Engineered for the World: Software That Delivers
services.softwareDevDesc: Websites, web apps, mobile apps, and monorepo ecosystems built with modern architectures and best practices.
services.cloudDevopsDesc: REST/GraphQL APIs, payment gateways, GIS systems, and scalable data architectures.
services.aiMlDesc: Private AI assistants, local LLMs, workflow automation, and intelligent document processing.
services.itCybersecurityDesc: Legacy modernization, DevOps, security audits, cloud cost optimization, and support.
process.title: Our Process
process.intro: We follow a rigorous, transparent process that ensures every project is delivered on time, within scope, and beyond expectations.
process.step1Desc: We start by understanding your business, users, and goals. Deep research, stakeholder interviews, and technical audits inform a clear product roadmap.
process.step2Desc: Our architects design scalable, maintainable systems. We prototype interfaces and validate technical decisions before a single line of production code is written.
process.step3Desc: Agile sprints with continuous client feedback. We ship incrementally, test rigorously, and adapt quickly — ensuring quality at every stage of development.
process.step4Desc: We deploy to production with zero-downtime strategies, monitor performance, and provide ongoing support to scale your product as your business grows.

about.heroDesc: We design, build, and scale software that drives real business outcomes. From startups to enterprises, we deliver engineering excellence from Costa Rica.
about.tagline: Crafted in Costa Rica — Built for the World
about.valuesIntro: Every decision we make is guided by a set of core principles that define how we build, collaborate, and deliver.
about.value1Desc: We write clean, maintainable code. Every line is intentional, every architecture decision is validated, and every solution is built to last.
about.value2Desc: Automated testing, code reviews, and CI/CD pipelines are non-negotiable. We ship with confidence because we verify at every stage.
about.value3Desc: Systems designed to grow. We build with future demands in mind, ensuring your platform handles growth without painful rewrites.
about.value4Desc: We measure success by outcomes, not output. Every line of code, every architectural decision, and every deployment is evaluated against the real business impact it creates.
team.member1Bio: Sofia leads our engineering team with 10+ years of experience building scalable distributed systems. She specializes in cloud architecture and backend systems.
team.member2Bio: Valeria founded tria with a vision to build software that delivers real impact. She brings 15+ years of experience in technology leadership and product strategy.
featured.project1Desc: Multi-platform valet and parking management system with web dashboard, mobile apps, and multi-tenant architecture serving companies, customers, and valet staff.
featured.project2Desc: Comprehensive driver and transportation management system featuring OCR pipeline, RBAC security, and real-time delivery monitoring for courier services.
parkit.challenge: Legacy parking management systems were fragmented across platforms with no central dashboard, limited real-time visibility, and poor mobile support for both operators and end users.
parkit.approach: We designed a multi-tenant architecture from scratch: a React web dashboard for companies, React Native apps for valet staff and end users, all powered by a Go backend on AWS.
parkit.result: A unified parking ecosystem with real-time tracking across all platforms, automated billing, and seamless multi-company management. Scalable to thousands of parking spots.
choferes.challenge: Courier companies relied on manual driver management, paper document verification, and lacked real-time tracking. Scaling operations was limited by fragmented processes and security gaps.
choferes.approach: Built a comprehensive platform with OCR-based document verification, RBAC security layers, real-time GPS tracking, and a Kubernetes-backed microservices architecture for scalability.
choferes.result: Automated driver onboarding, real-time delivery monitoring, centralized operations dashboard, and a secure multi-role access system. Reduced manual processing by over 80%.
featured.project3Desc: Safety scoring API integrating OIJ crime data, NASA VIIRS lighting, OSM infrastructure, and citizen reports across 137 countries with standardized ingestion pipelines.
featured.project4Desc: Intelligent routing engine that calculates the safest path between any two points on the planet. Weighs road segments based on lighting, crime risk, surface type, and incline using OpenStreetMap data.
featured.project5Desc: Comprehensive web-based root cause analysis tool implementing Ishikawa diagrams, 5 Whys methodology, and corrective action plans with PDF and Excel export for quality management.
testimonial.1.name: Ricardo Fernández
testimonial.1.title: CTO, FinTech Solutions CR
testimonial.1.quote: tria transformed our legacy platform into a modern, scalable system. Their engineering team integrated seamlessly with ours and delivered ahead of schedule. The architecture they designed has handled 3x our projected growth without breaking a sweat.
testimonial.2.name: María Soto
testimonial.2.title: CEO, HealthData Labs
testimonial.2.quote: Working with tria was a game-changer for our data infrastructure. They built a HIPAA-compliant analytics platform that gave us real-time insights we never had before. Their deep technical expertise and collaborative approach made all the difference.
testimonial.3.name: Carlos Ureña
testimonial.3.title: VP Engineering, LogiCore
testimonial.3.quote: tria's AI/ML team built a predictive model that saved us millions in operational costs. They didn't just deliver a solution — they taught our team how to maintain and improve it. True partners in every sense.
testimonial.4.name: Ana Rivas
testimonial.4.title: Director of Product, CloudServe
testimonial.4.quote: From discovery to deployment, tria demonstrated exceptional professionalism and technical skill. Our cloud migration was completed on time, under budget, and with zero downtime. I recommend them without reservation.

Our
Services
services.hero.desc: Full-stack engineering, cloud architecture, AI, and security — we deliver complete software solutions tailored to your business objectives.
services.engagement.title: How We Engage
services.engagement.intro: Different needs call for different models. We tailor our engagement to match your project, budget, and timeline.
services.engagement.projectBasedDesc: Fixed scope, timeline, and budget. Ideal for defined product builds with clear requirements.
services.engagement.sprintBasedDesc: Fixed-length sprints with clear deliverables each iteration. Ideal for evolving projects with shifting priorities.
services.engagement.dedicatedTeamDesc: A full-time extension of your engineering team, working as your own developers.
services.engagement.advisoryDesc: Strategic CTO-level guidance for architecture decisions and technology planning.
services.desc1: Custom web and mobile applications built with modern architectures and best practices. We deliver production-ready systems designed for scalability, security, and maintainability.
services.desc2: Scalable cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and automated deployments across AWS, GCP, and Azure. We architect systems that grow with your business.
services.desc3: Intelligent systems, predictive models, and data-driven automation. From LLM integration to computer vision, we build AI solutions that deliver measurable business value.
services.desc4: Security audits, risk assessments, and strategic technology planning. We help you build resilient systems that protect your data and your reputation.

services.showcase.sub: Four core disciplines — one integrated approach to building exceptional software.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: We offer end-to-end software development services including web and mobile applications, cloud infrastructure and DevOps, AI/ML solutions, cybersecurity, legacy system modernization, API design, and technology advisory. Every engagement is tailored to your specific needs and business objectives.
faq.q2: How does the engagement process work?
faq.a2: We start with a discovery phase to understand your business, goals, and technical requirements. From there, we propose the best engagement model — project-based with fixed scope and pricing, a dedicated team that works as an extension of yours, or strategic advisory for technology planning and architecture decisions.
faq.q3: How long does a typical project take?
faq.a3: Timelines vary depending on complexity and scope. A landing page or simple website can take 2–4 weeks. Multi-page applications and platforms typically range from 6–12 weeks. Larger enterprise systems with AI or complex integrations may take 3–6 months or more. We provide clear timelines during the discovery phase.
faq.q4: What technologies and tools do you use?
faq.a4: We choose the right tools for each problem. Our frontend stack includes React, Next.js, Astro, and TypeScript. For backend we use Node.js, Go, Python, and Java. Infrastructure runs on AWS, GCP, and Azure with Kubernetes and Terraform. For AI/ML we work with PyTorch, LangChain, and OpenAI — always selecting battle-tested technologies.
faq.q5: How much do projects typically cost?
faq.a5: Our pricing is transparent and project-dependent. Websites and digital presence start from $400. Web and mobile applications start from $1,800. Backend, AI, and automation projects start from $2,500. For complex or large-scale projects, we provide a custom quote after understanding your full requirements.
faq.q6: Do you offer post-launch support and maintenance?
faq.a6: Yes. Every project includes a post-launch support period. We also offer ongoing maintenance, monitoring, and evolution plans to keep your software secure, up-to-date, and performing at its best as your business grows.
faq.q7: How do you ensure quality and security?
faq.a7: Quality is built into every stage of our process. We follow rigorous code review practices, automated testing, CI/CD pipelines, and performance benchmarking. For security, we conduct architecture reviews, implement OWASP best practices, and follow zero-trust principles. We can also work toward HIPAA or SOC2 compliance when needed.
faq.q8: How do I get started with my project?
faq.a8: Getting started is simple. Reach out through our contact form or email us directly at hola@triacr.com. We'll schedule a call to discuss your project, understand your goals, and propose a tailored solution — typically within 24 hours.
